summary: Successfully tested all 8 new features: Backup APIs (download/server save), Selective delete, Employee accounts, Notifications page, Customer/Supplier family buttons, Product view modes, AI Assistant. All backend APIs pass (23/23 tests). All frontend features verified working.

passed_tests.details: GET /api/backup/create returns JSON with collections data, creates downloadable backup
POST /api/backup/save-to-server saves backup to server, returns filename. Keeps last 10 backups.
GET /api/backup/list returns array of available backups on server
POST /api/system/selective-delete with confirm_code='DELETE-SELECTED' deletes specified collections. Validates wrong codes correctly.
POST /api/employees/{id}/create-account creates user account linked to employee. DELETE /api/employees/{id}/delete-account removes it.
Page loads at /notifications. Shows tabs (Notifications/Settings). Settings allow configuring low_stock, debt_reminder, cash_difference thresholds, sound, email.
In Add Customer dialog, 'عائلة الزبون' section visible with 'إضافة عائلة' button to create new family
In Add Supplier dialog, 'عائلة المورد' section visible with 'إضافة عائلة' button to create new family
Products page has 3 view mode buttons: Grid (default), List, Compact. All three switch view correctly.
Purple sparkle button triggers AI panel. Panel has chat/analysis tabs, input field, quick actions.

seed_data_creation: Test data created/cleaned during tests (TEST_ prefixed employees and families)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Backup APIs at /api/backup/* (create, save-to-server, list), 2) Selective delete at /api/system/selective-delete requires confirm_code='DELETE-SELECTED', 3) Employee accounts created via /api/employees/{id}/create-account, 4) Notifications page at /notifications with settings tab, 5) Customer/Supplier family add buttons visible in their respective add dialogs, 6) Product view modes (Grid/List/Compact) persist to localStorage, 7) AI Assistant accessible via purple button on all pages.

employee_accounts: POST /api/employees/{id}/create-account - Create user account for employee
notifications: GET /api/notifications/all - Get all notifications with pagination
